hero.title: Strategic Light
hero.subtitle: We transform data into fast and secure decisions for

story.paragraph1: Long before algorithms existed, the Tupi peoples understood something essential: the future leaves signs in the present. For them,
story.kuaraySuffix: — the sun — was not just light, but cycle. Dawn was not a surprise; it was a consequence of patterns observed with attention.
story.paragraph2: Shamans didn't guess. They recognized signs. Before the rain, the wind changed. Before scarcity, movements altered. Before disease spread, the environment already indicated imbalance. There were signs — and there were those who knew how to read them.
story.kwarAiSuffix: is born from this same logic. It's a strategic light for public health decisions.
story.paragraph4: Epidemics don't begin when they become news. They form silently, leaving traces in environmental, epidemiological, and behavioral data. What seems like isolated noise can reveal trends when analyzed together. Our work is to identify these convergences before they become crises.
story.paragraph5: From this same logic comes the
story.paragraph5Suffix: , with a simple conviction: outbreaks announce their own arrival. Epidemiological intelligence is the ability to recognize this announcement in time to act.
story.quote: The sun rises for everyone. But

card.title: Ancestral Wisdom. Scientific Intelligence.
card.descriptionSuffix: combines the ancestral logic of observing signs with the rigor of statistical modeling and data science. It doesn't interpret omens — it analyzes environmental, epidemiological, and behavioral data to transform indications into anticipated and responsible decisions.

pillars.title: The Four Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Our philosophy unites nature's cycles with the precision of scientific modeling.

renewal.title: Renewal
renewal.description: Models that continuously learn from new data, adapting to environmental, behavioral, and epidemiological changes.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Complex analyses translated into actionable intelligence — so strategic decisions can be made safely.

cyclicity.title: Cyclicity
cyclicity.description: Diseases follow seasonal patterns and predictable dynamics. We map these cycles with statistical rigor.

anticipation.title: Anticipation
anticipation.description: We identify early warning signs and issue alerts in advance — when there's still time to act.

managers.title: For Managers
managers.quote: You don't need to guess. You need data that anticipates.

doctors.title: For Doctors
doctors.quote: Know where the next wave will hit before it arrives.

society.title: For Society
society.quote: Prevention is light. Reaction is darkness.

products.title: Our
products.subtitle: From AI assistant to specialized training, we offer tools to transform data into strategic decisions.

epidbot.title: EPIDBOT
epidbot.subtitle: AI Assistant for Epidemiological Analysis
epidbot.description: An AI assistant developed by Kwar-AI to make public health data analysis accessible, structured, and strategic. Ask questions in natural language and receive analyses based on official data.

naturalLanguage.title: Natural Language
naturalLanguage.description: Queries in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.

datasusDownload.title: DATASUS Download
datasusDownload.description: Automated download of public databases via PySUS.

duckdbAnalysis.title: DuckDB Analysis
duckdbAnalysis.description: SQL and statistical analysis with DuckDB.

localData.title: Local Data
localData.description: Upload and integration of local and restricted data.

capabilities.title: What EpidBot delivers
items: Automatic generation of charts and maps
Upload and analysis of local data

chatMock.userQuestion: Show the evolution of dengue cases in São Paulo in the last 6 months

individual.title: Individual Training (Online)
individual.subtitle: For autonomous professionals
features: Complete AI course applied to public health
Access to EpidBot platform during the course

institutional.title: Institutional Training
institutional.subtitle: For health departments, hospitals, and institutions

howItWorks.title: From raw data to
howItWorks.subtitle: Our process transforms millions of data points into actionable insights in four steps.

step1.title: Data Collection
step1.description: We gather data from multiple sources: climate, Google searches, emergency care, disease notifications, and socioeconomic determinants.

step2.title: Neural Processing
step2.description: Our AI models analyze historical patterns and identify correlations invisible to the human eye.

step3.title: Alert Generation
step3.description: System classifies the scenario and generates early warnings 14-21 days in advance.

step4.title: Preventive Action
step4.description: Managers receive actionable recommendations for resource allocation and preventive actions.

audience.title: Who Is It For
audience.subtitle: Our solutions are designed for different profiles in the health ecosystem

managers.title: Public Managers
managers.description: Municipal and state health departments that need to allocate resources efficiently.

professionals.title: Health Professionals
professionals.description: Doctors, nurses, and surveillance teams on the front lines.

platforms.title: Health Platforms
platforms.description: Applications and systems that need intelligent data for their users.

research.title: Research Institutions
research.description: Universities and research centers studying epidemiology and public health.

contact.title: Let's
contact.subtitle: Get in touch to learn more about our solutions or schedule a demonstration. We're ready to illuminate the future of public health with you.
contact.quote: The sun rises for everyone. But those with KWAR-AI see the light 21 days earlier.

footer.description: Brazilian-origin epidemiological intelligence. We anticipate disease outbreaks up to 21 days in advance, combining climate, behavioral, and health data.
